rulings.Case Title: JON DOE JR VS. CHARLES AKHIDNEOR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Compel Production Of Admin Hrg Transcript
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 10, 2014, line 1. PLAINTIFF JON DOE's Motion To Compel Production Of Administrative Hearing Transcript GRANTED. Non-opposition filed. Prevailing party prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 1369 HYDE STREET, LTD VS. WILLIAM B. REILLY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Second Amended Ntc Of Mtn For Leave To Amend Answer To Second Amended Cross Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 10, 2014, line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT 1369 HYDE STREET, LTD's Motion For Leave To Amend Answer To Second Amended Cross Complaint DENIED without prejudice to re-new the motion if trial is continued and discovery deadline is extended for at least 3 months. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatory No. 3; And For Sanctions Against Defs
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 10, 2014, line 3. PLAINTIFF MELANIE MCDOLE's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatory No. 3; And For Sanctions Against Defendants OFF CALENDAR per request of the moving party. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MIGUEL SOSA et al VS. BTP MISSION TIFFANY LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 10, 2014, line 4. DEFENDANT BTP MISSION TIFFANY LLC's MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT DENIED. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges facts to support punitive damages re: malice and oppression. Authority or ratification of actions taken/not taken by Sepaher and Baily sufficiently alleged. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RED BRIDGE PARTNERS, LLC VS. NOLAN LEE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Arbitration And Request For Stay
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 10, 2014, line 5. PLAINTIFF RED BRIDGE PARTNERS, LLC's Motion To Compel Arbitration And Request For Stay GRANTED. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NINA ZHIGADLO VS. MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 10, 2014, line 6. DEFENDANT HYDE STREET HOLDING COMPANY, LLC's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend for misjoinder. King and Allen are not precluded from filing a separate action if proper. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL TRADELIUS VS. RYAN HESS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 10, 2014, line 7. CROSS DEFENDANT PAUL TRADELIUS' DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT Continued to March 11, 2014. Moving party shall provide courtesy copies of the moving papers and opposing party shall provide courtesy copies of the opposition per SFLR 2.6B and C to department 501 no later than February 18, 2014 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN SOLLNER VS. BANNAM PLACE, LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 10, 2014, line 8. DEFENDANT BANNAM PLACE, LLC's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, allegations in complaint must be taken as true. Lack of assignment per CCP 673(a) does not preclude existence of other assignment. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARIA T LOPEZ et al VS. U.S. BANK , N.A. AS TRUSTEE FOR THE SARM 2006-8 et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 10, 2014, line 9. DEFENDANT FIRST AMERICAN TRUSTEE SERVICING SOLUTIONS, LLC's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Continued to March 12, 2014. Opposing party shall provide courtesy copies of the opposition per SFLR 2.6B to department 501 no later than February 18, 2014 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARIA T LOPEZ et al VS. U.S. BANK , N.A. AS TRUSTEE FOR THE SARM 2006-8 et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Pltffs' Unverified Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 10, 2014, line 9. DEFENDANT FIRST AMERICAN TRUSTEE SERVICING SOLUTIONS, LLC's Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs' Unverified Complaint Continued to March 12, 2014. Opposing party shall provide courtesy copies of the opposition per SFLR 2.6B to department 501 no later than February 18, 2014 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PATRICIA RICHARDSON VS. DAVID SCHOOP et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 10, 2014, line 10. DEFENDANT DAVID SCHOOP, ALLISON GREEN and CATHERINE SCHOOP's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OFF CALENDAR, moot. Case settled. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 698 BUSH STREET LP VS. EVERETT HERRERA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 10, 2014, line 11. DEFENDANT EVERETT HERRERA'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND GRANTED subject to (1) opposition; (2) filing answer no later than February 11, 2014; and (3) positing $9,580 with the Court no later than February 11, 2014. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DOUGLAS ERAZO VS. SANTOS, ANDREA A/K/A ANDREA GUEVARA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 10, 2014, line 12. DEFENDANT SANTOS and ANDREA A/K/A ANDREA GUEVARA's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to specify his interest in the subject property and attach Attachment 15 or remove references to such attachment from complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EDMUND CHUTE VS. BRITTA GARCIA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 10, 2014, line 13. DEFENDANT BRITTA GARCIA and JAMES SALTZMAN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Overruled. The Complaint sufficiently alleges facts to state a cause of action fro unlawful detainer. Moving party improperly raises issues of fact. = (501/REQ)
